default.criteria_text: Approved when ICD-10 indicates appropriate indication, prescriber is in-network, and first-line alternatives have been documented as tried or contraindicated.

00093-5050-01|UHC-CHOICE-PLUS.criteria_text: Lisinopril 10mg approved as first-line ACE-I for I10 (essential hypertension) with documented BP > 140/90 across two visits. Generic preferred. No PA needed if member has prior ACE-I claims in last 180 days.

00093-1059-01|UHC-CHOICE-PLUS.criteria_text: Metformin 500mg approved for E11.x (T2DM) with A1c >= 6.5. First-line per ADA guidelines. No PA needed if member has prior metformin claims in last 90 days.

00093-5050-01|AETNA-OAP-GOLD.criteria_text: Lisinopril covered without prior authorization on Aetna OAP Gold formulary.
